metadata.description: Curated Claude Code skills for IT operations professionals. Bundles for JSM ticket management, Google Workspace administration, Okta identity management, and MDM device queries. Built by an IT Director with 10+ years in remote-first SaaS environments.

plugins.name: jsm-ticket-management
plugins.description: Jira Service Management ticket operations — search, update, comment, transition, and triage tickets using natural language. Use when working with JSM tickets, IT support queues, incident management, or service requests.

plugins.name: google-workspace-admin
plugins.description: Google Workspace administration via natural language — replaces common GAM commands with conversational queries. All write operations require explicit confirmation before execution. Use when managing Google Workspace users, groups, OUs, devices, or audit logs.

plugins.name: okta-admin
plugins.description: Okta identity and access management — user lookups, group management, app assignments, and factor administration. Onboarding and offboarding workflows are disabled by default and must be explicitly enabled. Use when managing Okta users, groups, applications, or troubleshooting SSO issues.

plugins.name: mdm-query
plugins.description: Read-only MDM device queries across Kandji, Jamf, and Intune. Look up device assignments, installed profiles, OS versions, compliance status, and hardware specs. No device actions or commands — query only. Use when someone asks about a user's device, what profiles are pushed, compliance status, or fleet inventory questions.

plugins.name: slack-it-support
plugins.description: Slack communication for IT support workflows — reply to users after resolving tickets, post status updates to IT channels, and read Slack threads for context. Pairs with JSM, Okta, GWS, and MDM skills as the notification layer. Use when replying in Slack, notifying a user, posting a status update, or reading a Slack thread for ticket context.
